---
title: "during perception"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
library(dplyr)
```


```{r}
preprocess <- function(file) {
  subject <- read.csv(file, header = TRUE, sep = ",") %>% 
    select(subject_nr, BB_test_audio, BB_test_left, BB_test_right, NB_test_audio, NB_test_left, NB_test_right, count_radboudbox_response_BB_test, count_radboudbox_response_NB_test,response, response_radboudbox_response_BB_test, response_radboudbox_response_NB_test, title) %>% #relevant columns
    slice(c((5:88),(173:256))) %>% #relevant rows
    mutate(
      contStep = case_when(
      BB_test_audio == "sik-sec1.wav" ~ "1",
      BB_test_audio == "sik-sec2.wav" ~ "2",
      BB_test_audio == "sik-sec3.wav" ~ "3",
      BB_test_audio == "sik-sec4.wav" ~ "4",
      BB_test_audio == "sik-sec5.wav" ~ "5",
      BB_test_audio == "sik-sec6.wav" ~ "6",
      BB_test_audio == "sik-sec7.wav" ~ "7",
      BB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_1_stereo.wav" ~ "1",
      BB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_2_stereo.wav" ~ "2",
      BB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_3_stereo.wav" ~ "3",
      BB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_4_stereo.wav" ~ "4",
      BB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_5_stereo.wav" ~ "5",
      BB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_6_stereo.wav" ~ "6",
      BB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_7_stereo.wav" ~ "7",
      BB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_1_stereo.wav" ~ "1",
      BB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_2_stereo.wav" ~ "2",
      BB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_3_stereo.wav" ~ "3",
      BB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_4_stereo.wav" ~ "4",
      BB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_5_stereo.wav" ~ "5",
      BB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_6_stereo.wav" ~ "6",
      BB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_7_stereo.wav" ~ "7",
      NB_test_audio == "sik-sec1.wav" ~ "1",
      NB_test_audio == "sik-sec2.wav" ~ "2",
      NB_test_audio == "sik-sec3.wav" ~ "3",
      NB_test_audio == "sik-sec4.wav" ~ "4",
      NB_test_audio == "sik-sec5.wav" ~ "5",
      NB_test_audio == "sik-sec6.wav" ~ "6",
      NB_test_audio == "sik-sec7.wav" ~ "7",
      NB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_1_stereo.wav" ~ "1",
      NB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_2_stereo.wav" ~ "2",
      NB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_3_stereo.wav" ~ "3",
      NB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_4_stereo.wav" ~ "4",
      NB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_5_stereo.wav" ~ "5",
      NB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_6_stereo.wav" ~ "6",
      NB_test_audio == "pip-pep_continuumStep_7_stereo.wav" ~ "7",
      NB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_1_stereo.wav" ~ "1",
      NB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_2_stereo.wav" ~ "2",
      NB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_3_stereo.wav" ~ "3",
      NB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_4_stereo.wav" ~ "4",
      NB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_5_stereo.wav" ~ "5",
      NB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_6_stereo.wav" ~ "6",
      NB_test_audio == "kik-kek_continuumStep_7_stereo.wav" ~ "7",
      TRUE ~ "filler"),
      group = case_when(
        title == "BB-NB" ~ "BN",
        title == "NB-BB" ~ "NB"
        ),
      responseVowel = case_when(
      BB_test_left == "sik" & response == "A" ~ "I", 
      BB_test_right== "sec" & response == "E" ~ "E",
      BB_test_left == "pip" & response == "A" ~ "I",
      BB_test_right== "pep" & response == "E" ~ "E",
      BB_test_left == "kek" & response == "A" ~ "E",
      BB_test_right== "kik" & response == "E" ~ "I",
      NB_test_left == "sik" & response == "A" ~ "I", 
      NB_test_right== "sec" & response == "E" ~ "E",
      NB_test_left == "pip" & response == "A" ~ "I",
      NB_test_right== "pep" & response == "E" ~ "E",
      NB_test_left == "kek" & response == "A" ~ "E",
      NB_test_right== "kik" & response == "E" ~ "I"
      ),
      audio = case_when(
      group == "BN" & row_number() < 85 ~ BB_test_audio,
      group == "BN" & row_number() > 84 ~ NB_test_audio,
      group == "NB" & row_number() < 85 ~ NB_test_audio,
      group == "NB" & row_number() > 84 ~ BB_test_audio
      ),
      biteblock = case_when(
      group == "BN" & row_number() < 85 ~ "Y",
      group == "BN" & row_number() > 84 ~ "N",
      group == "NB" & row_number() < 85 ~ "N",
      group == "NB" & row_number() > 84 ~ "Y"
      ),
      responseE = (case_when(
        response == "E" ~ "1",
        response == "I" ~ "0",
        TRUE ~ "filler")
        ),
       pair = case_when(BB_test_left == "sik" | BB_test_right == "sik"~ "sik-sec",
                        BB_test_left == "pip" | BB_test_right == "pip" ~ "pip-pep",
                        BB_test_left == "kek" | BB_test_right == "kek" ~ "kik-kek",
                        NB_test_left == "sik" | NB_test_right == "sik"~ "sik-sec",
                        NB_test_left == "pip" | NB_test_right == "pip" ~ "pip-pep",
                        NB_test_left == "kek" | NB_test_right == "kek" ~ "kik-kek"
    )
    )
}


```

```{r}
percep <- preprocess("subject-1.csv")
```

```{r}
for (n in c(2:22)){
  name <- paste("subject-",n,".csv", sep = '')
  processed<- preprocess(name)
  processed_n <- processed
  percep <- bind_rows(percep, processed_n)
}

nrow(percep)
write.csv(percep, file = "percepduring.csv")
```
